description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes C++ code. The workflow should trigger on push events to the master branch for .cpp and .h files, on pull requests to the master branch for .cpp and .h files, and on a scheduled basis every Tuesday at 22:00 UTC. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job to checkout the repository, install dependencies, set up QBS, build the project, and perform CodeQL analysis.
